headline: Coinbase Global Inc (COIN)’s Stablecoin Revenue Could Grow Sevenfold
summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) is among the best NFT stocks to invest in according to analysts. Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) recently helped settle insurance premium payments with stablecoins for Aon PLC (AON), according to a March 9 press release. The transaction used stablecoins such as USDC on Ethereum and PayPal USD on Solana. It marked […]
